plugins.calendarPermission: Brush needs calendar access to import events as tasks.
plugins.remindersPermission: Brush needs reminders access to import your incomplete reminders as tasks.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Brush needs "Always" location access to alert you when you're near a task's location.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Brush needs "Always" location access to alert you when you're near a task's location.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Brush needs your location to show nearby task alerts.
